---
title: "Sharing & Versioning"
format: html
---

To ensure your OER lives beyond your immediate project:

### Share

-   Institutional repositories.

-   GitHub Pages.

-   OER Commons.

### Provide clear attribution information

Include:

-   title;
-   authors;
-   licence;
-   version;
-   date created/updated.

### Use version control

Tools like GitHub facilitate:

-   transparent updates;
-   change logs;
-   issues and contributions.

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-align="center" width="50"}](/OERs%20for%20creators/Creator-Adapting,%20Revising,%20and%20Remixing.html)
